legal_header_intro_p1: Projekt City is a private, independent project provided to you completely free of charge as part of itsmarian.dev. By downloading, you receive a compressed ZIP file which you can unzip and load directly into Minecraft - at your own risk.
legal_header_intro_p2: Please note that Projekt City is managed by itsmarian.dev. The legally required Imprint (Legal Notice) and central contact information can be found at itsmarian.dev/legal/imprint.
legal_header_intro_p3: By continuing, you confirm that you have read and agree to our Advertisement Terms, End-User Licence Agreement, Privacy Policy, Terms of Use, and Use Our World Policy. If you do not agree, please leave our website and refrain from using our services.
s_ghpages_p: This Website is hosted as a GitHub Pages website. GitHub may collect User Personal Information from visitors to this GitHub Pages website, including logs of visitor IP addresses, to comply with legal obligations, and to maintain the security and integrity of this Website and the Service. See the GitHub Privacy Statement for details.
s_analytics_p: For the protection and continuous improvement of our services, we use Google Analytics from Google LLC. The following actions performed on the website are recognized, tracked and analyzed if you accept them:
s_cookies_p1: This site is hosted via GitHub Pages. See above for a detailed description of GitHub's cookies.
s_cookies_p2: We use the cookies provided by Google LLC to ensure the security of our site and to recognize, analyze and evaluate user behavior and interactions if the consent is granted.
s_cookies_p3: If you do not want the collection of interactions and your user behavior, you can change your preferences in our cookie banner on every site or use Google's add-on to disable Google Analytics for your browser: https://tools.google.com/dlpage/gaoptout
s_cookies_linked_p: For more information about links to third parties see §3.10 / §3.10.11 in our privacy policy.
s_ads_what_title: What are Google Ads and why do we use this service?
s_ads_what_p: We use Adsense from Google LLC to reinvest the revenue generated there in the project, for example to provide our domain and other costs incurred by the further development of Projekt City. Nevertheless, we try not to impair the user experience and to provide pleasant advertising.
s_ads_pref_title: How do I set my preferences?
s_ads_pref_p1: If you are in the European Economic Area and are visiting our website for the first time, you will see a banner from Google asking for your consent. You have the option of either selecting "Agree" or adjusting your settings under "Manage options".
s_ads_pref_p2: By clicking "Agree", you consent to Google and its partners processing data for various purposes, including
s_ads_li1: Storing and accessing information on your device
s_ads_li2: Use of reduced data to select advertisements and content
s_ads_li3: Creating profiles for personalized advertising and content
s_ads_li4: Measuring advertising performance and the performance of content
s_ads_li5: Analysis of target groups through statistical evaluations
s_ads_li6: Combination of data from various sources to improve offers
s_ads_li7: Security assurance, fraud prevention and troubleshooting
s_ads_li8: Storage and transmission of your data protection decisions
s_ads_li9: Identification of end devices and linking of multiple devices
s_ads_manage_p1: If you click on "Manage Options", a menu will open in which you can customize the various purposes of use and allow or reject certain providers for advertising purposes.
s_ads_manage_p2: If you deactivate a purpose of use, this means that your data will not be processed for this purpose by any provider.
s_ads_manage_p3: At the bottom of the menu you will find the "Provider settings", where you can view the providers that may use your data to provide services. If you reject a provider, this may mean that this provider will no longer use your data for its purposes.
s_ads_manage_p4: Next to each provider, the type of consent they are asking for is displayed and you have the option to access the provider's privacy policy. You can give or withdraw your consent at any time. However, some providers do not ask for your consent, but process your personal data on the basis of a legitimate interest.
s_ads_manage_p5: You will also find the options "Accept all" and "Confirm selection". If you click on "Accept all", you consent to Google and its partners using your data for the purposes mentioned above, among others.
s_ads_manage_p6: If you click on "Confirm selection", only the purposes and providers you have selected will be taken into account.
s_ads_manage_p7: Further information on data processing can be found in the Google Privacy Policy and in our Privacy Policy.
s_ads_change_title: How can I change my preferences?
s_ads_change_p: You can customize your preferences for Google Ads at any time. To do this, click on the text "Privacy and cookie settings" at the bottom of a page and the menu mentioned above will open.
s_ads_block_title: I do not want to see ads!
s_ads_block_p: We fully understand that advertising - in whatever form - can be annoying and are prepared to do without advertising if you don't want it. There are many ways to block ads on websites:
s_ads_block_li1: Use an AdBlocker, such as uBlock Origin or Adblock Plus
s_ads_block_li2: For iPhone, iPads, MacBooks and other Apple products: install a DNS with AdBlock or use a VPN (Virtual Private Network)
s_ads_block_li3: Use the integrated function of your browser to block ads
